channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fence as fallen down, 16th May
item.description:
Fence next to the foot path as fallen down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbine Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gipsy Road SE27 at Gipsy Hill junction is a zebra cro, 16th May
item.description:
Gipsy Road SE27 at Gipsy Hill junction is a zebra crossing with one Belisha Beacon not working Tuesday night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188, Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged Car, 16th May
item.description:
Silver Mercedes, reg DYM 227V, parked in a bay. Taxed but no MOT. Car has significant damage to the front of the vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnell Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aside of junction Gresse St & Stephen Mews, 16th May
item.description:
Ammonia showing in water leaking into pub cellar under Gresse St.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Gresse Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chippings from pothole and being ejected and damaging vehicles in Kenilworth Road, 16th May
item.description:
Chippings from an unattended pothole are being ejected and damaging vehicles, see attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knoll Road, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Fly-posting, 16th May
item.description:
Please see the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alma Road, Longlands, Greater London

item.title: Black graffiti tag on northern side of Lesnes Abbey walkover nearest pavement., 16th May
item.description:
This area is a hotspot for graffiti. These fools have done it again. Please put cameras so we can track and find and deal with these miscreants.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Silver and pink graffiti tags on lamppost near bus stop, 16th May
item.description:
A couple.of tags on this post have been here for a couple of weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gayton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fresh graffiti on wall by stairs opposite Abbey Wood Station, 16th May
item.description:
This area has been free of graffiti for a while but of course it pops up again. We really need to find these perpetrators and deal with them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lighting column leaning, sheared bolts, 16th May
item.description:
The lamp column in leaning over and could fall, the bolts have been sheared and no longer holding the post down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenwood Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left, 16th May
item.description:
Lots of litter around here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cromford Path, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over hanging Willow Tree., 16th May
item.description:
Please cut down the over hanging Willow Tree outside 135 Witherston Way SE9. Especially around the green gates which lead to set of council garages. We have to drive through the willow tree to get in and out every day. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): William Barefoot Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Appliance dumped, 16th May
item.description:
Appliance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish / lots of rubbish in road, 16th May
item.description:
Lots of rubbish in road and around

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars blocking pavements, 16th May
item.description:
Cars blocking pavements in thistlebrook
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thistlebrook, Abbey Wood

item.title: Fly tipping near bin - old washing machine, 16th May
item.description:
Old broken washing machine left out by bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London

item.title: Abandoned Van, 16th May
item.description:
Parked outside 65 manordene Road Abandoned Information vercile from Manchester This is a Rouge van DN70AZR no indecation Of make.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manordene Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees growing and overhanging onto buildings, 16th May
item.description:
Trees could cause damage to these outbuildings. Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elstree Gardens, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple private trees over growing and blocking the pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Multiple trees over growing and blocking the pavement along the whole length of summer hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Park Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
